raw_title: Response to the 2025 ICA Presidential Address: Whose cosmopolitan imagination? African reflections on Silvio Waisbord’s call for global communication studies
title_en: Response to the 2025 ICA Presidential Address: Whose cosmopolitan imagination? African reflections on Silvio Waisbord’s call for global communication studies
title_zh: 对2025年ICA主席演讲的回应：谁的全球想象？非洲对Silvio Waisbord全球传播研究呼吁的反思
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章回应了2025年国际传播协会主席Silvio Waisbord关于全球传播研究的演讲。作者从非洲视角出发，质疑了全球传播研究中的世界主义想象，探讨了谁的声音和观点被纳入这种全球视野中。文章强调了在传播研究中纳入非西方视角的重要性。
plain_summary_en: This article responds to the 2025 International Communication Association presidential address by Silvio Waisbord on global communication studies. From an African perspective, the author questions whose cosmopolitan imagination is represented in global communication research and explores whose voices and perspectives are included in this global vision. The article emphasizes the importance of incorporating non-Western perspectives in communication studies.
research_direction_zh: 探索全球传播研究中的权力关系、知识生产和代表性，特别关注非西方视角如何挑战和丰富现有的理论框架。
research_direction_en: Examining power relations, knowledge production, and representation in global communication studies, with particular focus on how non-Western perspectives challenge and enrich existing theoretical frameworks.
